# Pah

**Summary**: A class of organic compounds that are common components of crude oil and are known to be toxic.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] measured PAH concentrations in the oil samples.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] PAHs are key indicators of oil contamination and toxicity in marine environments.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018]] Quantified using GC and HPLC analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Concentration of total PAHs in SPP of oil-based mud was 345.58 ng/ml. ([[2018-amiruddin|Amiruddin, 2018, p. 17]])
